flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Carrington College-Phoenix North fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 11 pp at Carrington College-Phoenix North vs the 2007–2011 baseline (54.3% vs 64.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Carrington College-Phoenix North fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Carrington College-Phoenix North rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (61.2% → 74.1%).
